changelog: New: redesigned the in-browser download button — a subtle frosted control that stays out of your way and looks right on any page, light or dark
Fixed: Facebook Reels and feed videos now resolve to the real video link instead of a profile or page URL
Fixed: Facebook feed videos that occasionally showed no download button are now detected reliably
Fixed: YouTube no longer leaves a leftover download button after you preview a video in the home feed
Improved: the download button hides itself when a video is covered by a dialog or popup
Fixed: launching a download before the app finished starting could open two "Add Download" windows — now deduplicated
Improved: download details now show the active connection count and estimated time remaining
Fixed: file paths in the download and details windows no longer show the Windows \\?\ prefix
Updated: bundled yt-dlp to the 2026.06.09 release for better site compatibility
New: a built-in clean-reinstall tool that fully removes Aither for a fresh start — and can keep your download history
